characters.physical_details: Pink hair, green eyes; small, fit; left-palm scar; black horned headband kept at home.
characters.occupation_status: WISE field operative under cultural-attache cover; lives alone.

state_transitions.change: Files a false WISE assessment at 08:14, downgrading Damian and thinning coverage.
Hears a fragment about an asset inside WISE but cannot isolate the speaker.
Takes a baton hit that badly bruises her ribs; kisses Damian in the safe house.
Hears Damian recognize her at Becky's gala.
Admits to Sylvia that she knowingly distorted the Desmond assessment.
Tells Damian she is a telepath and learns he has known her identity since the gala.
Reinstated to field duty with cover intact.

characters.physical_details: Dark-haired, tall, controlled; split eyebrow scar after chapter_09.
characters.occupation_status: Foreign Affairs diplomat secretly working against the Renewal Front.

state_transitions.change: Nearly recognizes Anya from Eden at the state-dinner terrace.
Forms a limited intelligence alliance with Anya.
Survives the ambush, takes the eyebrow scar, and kisses Anya.
Identifies the cultural attache as Anya Forger at Becky's gala.
Loses his cache in the SSS raid; Mertens is endangered.
Publicly accuses Werner Voss and linked procurement channels at the summit.
Learns Anya is a telepath.

characters.physical_details: Older Desmond patriarch; mostly offstage, still authoritative.
characters.occupation_status: Retired patriarch whose name still controls party and defense access.

state_transitions.change: Re-enters continuity as a living authority when Damian takes his call.

characters.physical_details: Blond, graying at the temples, with reading glasses; still fit.
characters.occupation_status: Semi-retired WISE operative, Anya's handler, under university cover.
characters.literacy_languages: Reads/writes/speaks Westalian and Ostanian; other tradecraft languages implied.

state_transitions.change: Returns to active summit planning.
Finds Falk in east comms and learns Anya's false report created Falk's blind lane.
Lets Damian into the family dinner orbit after Anya's reinstatement.

characters.physical_details: Long black hair, youthful face, faint blade-work hand scars.
characters.occupation_status: City hall clerk publicly; Garden assassin until chapter_14, then acts for family.

state_transitions.change: Kills Karl Dominic, photographs manifests and Garden records, meets Anya, and withholds completion by pulling her battery.
Brings the Dominic evidence home and refuses further Garden assignments.
Kills the south-terrace attack team in Yuri's view.
Hosts the gala and tells Anya she alone sees her private self.

characters.physical_details: Short grey-blonde hair; reading glasses on a chain.

state_transitions.change: Accepts Anya's false Damian assessment into the system.
Flags that another agency reads the same sector differently.
Learns Anya knowingly distorted the assessment; keeps her on damage mapping.
Reinstates Anya after review.

characters.physical_details: Dark hair, intense expression, SSS build.
characters.occupation_status: Senior SSS officer on domestic intelligence and security.

state_transitions.change: Starts logging Anya's repeated government-room appearances.
Recognizes Yor on the summit terrace and covers for her.

characters.physical_details: Large elderly white dog; slow except during visions.
characters.occupation_status: Forger dog and former precognition experiment.
characters.literacy_languages: Animal cognition only; thinks in images and sensations.

state_transitions.change: Has a precognitive vision of violence at a government terrace.
Pins the summit threat to the south perimeter on Loid's map.

key_relationships.anya_forger: colleague whose false report he exploits

characters.occupation_status: Senior WISE analyst and long-term Renewal Front mole.

state_transitions.change: Appears as an ordinary analyst with cynical views on WISE threat framing.
Uses Anya's downgraded assessment to hollow out eastern coverage and becomes her lead mole suspect.
Exposed in east comms and taken into custody.

characters.occupation_status: National Unity broker tied to defense procurement and the Renewal Front.

state_transitions.change: Publicly accused at the summit and stripped of deniable distance.

characters.occupation_status: Manager of the active Desmond political-defense network.

state_transitions.change: Presses Damian back into the hard-security rooms and family machine.
Becomes harder to separate from the exposed defense network around the Desmond name.

timeline.story_start: Early autumn, post-Strix, in Berlint as Westalian-Ostanian tensions rise.
timeline.estimated_span: About six months: early autumn to late March; summit early November.

seasonal_track.season: Early November over roughly four days.

key_events.event: Anya burns the market dead-drop and clears Kinglet.
At the state dinner, Anya spots Damian as anti-Renewal.
Anya files the false report and opens direct contact with Damian.
Anya and Damian formalize a limited intelligence lane.
The Bretz operation surfaces Hartig, Krueger-Schiff, and a 400,000-dinar signoff.
Bond's vision and Sylvia's discrepancy call widen the crisis.
Damian is ambushed; Anya gets him to a safe house and the alliance turns romantic.
Yor kills Karl Dominic and finds Voss-linked manifests plus Garden records.
At Becky's gala Damian identifies the cultural attache as Anya Forger and the Kreuzfeld courier misses check-in.
Crane is killed at Kreuzfeld, Damian's cache is raided, and the eastern network burns.
Yor breaks with Garden, brings Dominic evidence home, and the family plans around Bond's warning.
At the summit, the terrace attack is stopped, Voss is accused, Falk is caught, and Yuri sees Yor.
Anya tells Damian about telepathy; Damian says he has known her identity since the gala.
By late March Anya is back in the field and Damian comes to dinner.

geography.primary_setting: Berlint, Ostania, between the Westalian mission, the ministries, and the summit venue.

key_locations.name: Westalian Diplomatic Quarter / WISE Station
key_locations.details: Anya's cover workplace and the concealed WISE hub.

key_locations.name: Ostanian Government District / Foreign Affairs Ministry
key_locations.details: Damian's workplace and site of the state dinner, forum, and ministry meetings.

key_locations.name: Berlint Central Market
key_locations.details: Market between the diplomatic quarter and government district; chapter_01 extraction site.

key_locations.name: Cafe Linden
key_locations.details: Debrief point between the mission and south-central residential districts.

key_locations.name: Anya's apartment
key_locations.details: Her adult residence; one room plus kitchenette.

key_locations.name: Forger Apartment
key_locations.details: Family home; Anya's childhood room is intact.

key_locations.name: Damian's apartment
key_locations.details: East-side apartment with the Eden class photo and childhood box.

key_locations.name: Berlint Gesellschaft Club
key_locations.details: Private club used for the Bretz operation.

key_locations.name: Blackbell Estate
key_locations.details: Site of Becky's gala and Damian's recognition of Anya.

key_locations.name: Dominic Compound
key_locations.details: Northern-outskirts weapons estate where Yor kills Karl Dominic and photographs the records.

key_locations.name: WISE Safe House
key_locations.details: West-district fallback apartment used after the chapter_09 ambush.

key_locations.name: International Conference Center
key_locations.details: Summit venue; interior route logic lives in outline/spatial_layout.json.

distances: Berlint Central Market sits between the diplomatic quarter and the government district.
Cafe Linden lies between the diplomatic quarter and the south-central residential districts.
The Dominic Compound is about forty minutes north of Berlint.
The International Conference Center sits apart from the ministry district; use outline/spatial_layout.json for routes.

world_rules: Anya reads surface thoughts within roughly twenty meters and cannot switch it off.
Strong emotion and active memory broadcast louder; crowds and sustained reading cause fatigue.
Surface thoughts are incomplete and can mislead under fear, shame, or illness.
Anya can read animal minds; Bond's precognition arrives as fragments and sensations.
Westalis and Ostania operate in a late-Cold-War structure with a militarized border and profiteers on both sides.
WISE works under diplomatic cover; the SSS handles domestic intelligence and event security.
Garden is a covert assassination network later shown to clean the Renewal Front supply chain.
Technology is late-20th-century analog/early-digital: landlines, mobiles, paper files, dead drops, secure relays.

power_structure.mechanism: Operational authority, tasking, and review control.

power_structure.over: The Desmond family machine, loyal aides, and inherited party access
power_structure.mechanism: Patriarchal authority, donor networks, his name.

power_structure.over: Renewal Front activity and allied procurement channels
power_structure.mechanism: Political influence, defense money, and hardline credibility.

power_structure.over: The usable Desmond machine around Damian
power_structure.mechanism: Family legitimacy, party access, defense expectations.

power_structure.over: Renewal Front access to WISE reporting lanes until his arrest
power_structure.mechanism: Senior analyst control over coverage, routing, desk priorities.

objects.name: Anya's childhood headband
objects.origin: Eden-era black horned headband kept in her childhood room.
objects.status: Still at the Forger apartment; Anya sometimes wears it there.

objects.name: Anya's false WISE assessment
objects.origin: Chapter_03 report filed at 08:14 under FORGER, ANYA; it downgraded Damian to low-priority monitoring.
objects.status: Thins eastern watch coverage and creates the blind lane Falk exploits.

objects.name: WS-7 movement revision note
objects.origin: Safe-house note from chapter_09: 18:12 / west exit revision / WS-7.
objects.status: Hard clue that the route leak ran through a movement-alert corridor.

objects.name: Krueger-Schiff secondary authorization
objects.origin: Lead pulled from Colonel Bretz's thoughts and the debrief.
objects.status: Ties Hartig to a 400,000-dinar freight push under strategic-interest cover.

objects.name: Maintenance Continuity Annex
objects.origin: Defense Liaison paperwork shown to Damian by Grosz.
objects.status: Shows duplicate 31,400-dinar charges for the same northern depot, one via Klee Civic Advisory.

objects.name: Gerald Falk's fountain pen
objects.origin: Graduation gift from Falk at Eden.
objects.status: Still in Anya's desk after Falk is exposed.

objects.name: Eden Academy class photo
objects.origin: Childhood class photo kept in Damian's unopened box.
objects.status: Used to confirm Anya's identity after the gala and again in chapter_16.

objects.name: Karl Dominic's shipping manifests
objects.origin: Photographed from Dominic's desk after his assassination.
objects.status: Link Voss and defense procurement to the weapons pipeline; used in planning and summit exposure.

objects.name: Garden subcontracting records
objects.origin: Photographed Dominic paperwork showing Garden-coded cleanup assignments.
objects.status: Show nine cleanup jobs across four years with midmonth releases tied to the same supply chain.

objects.name: Loid's kitchen whiteboard
objects.origin: Ordinary household planning board turned into the chapter_14 summit map.
objects.status: Used for summit planning after Bond marks the south perimeter threat.

income_sources.source: Anya's WISE salary through diplomatic cover
income_sources.reliability: Stable while cover and field status hold

income_sources.source: Loid's WISE support plus university cover
Yor's city hall salary plus former Garden pay
income_sources.amount: Ordinary salary plus former covert supplements
income_sources.reliability: Garden income ends when Yor breaks with the organization

income_sources.source: Damian's ministry salary plus Desmond family money
income_sources.reliability: Stable but politically exposed after the summit

knowledge_state.knows: She is a telepath who cannot switch the ability off.
Bond's burning-terrace vision points to the International Conference Center.
Her chapter_03 Damian assessment was knowingly false and opened Falk's blind lane.
She heard an asset inside WISE and a handoff window before review closed.
Anya is an operative under diplomatic cover.
The cultural attache is Anya Forger from Eden.
Anya is a telepath and has heard him since the state dinner.
Garden serviced the Renewal Front pipeline; its release dates match her pay pattern.
Anya's false report created the blind lane Falk exploited.
Anya's Desmond assessment was knowingly false and changed WISE routing.
Anya's repeated appearances in restricted government rooms form a pattern.
Yor killed the summit attack team, and he covered her as an unknown Westalian asset.
Anya's false report created exploitable blind lanes in WISE.

environmental_constants: Berlint runs from damp autumn into winter and late-March brightness.
The Forger apartment stays warm and cluttered: Bond fur, Yor's cooking, Loid's order.
WISE rooms are fluorescent and coffee-stained; venues are polished, over-secured, overheated.
Crowds hit Anya as layered radio-like noise.
